source_propositions: Any type of resource, storage, ram if possible, cpu if possible only if it makes sense
It's .html files they can be served as websites or p2p
changes: Expanded the market from mining capacity to typed resource capacity.
Bound RAM to execution leases unless a viable independent allocation mechanism is demonstrated.
Added direction-specific bandwidth and relay service boundaries.
Defined HTML kernels as content-addressed artifacts usable over local, web, P2P, and Noted mounting modes.
Separated artifact inspection, sandboxed execution, and capability grant.
